title: Crumbly Herbal Slovakian Milk Crumble
description: A post-workout Slovakian dish made with semi-skimmed milk and a crumbly herbal topping.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 180 degrees Celsius.
Mix the milk, sieved wild marigold petals, sieved dill weed, and salt-free seasoning blend in a bowl.
In a separate bowl, mix the vegetable oil, gluten-free flour, unsalted butter, sugar, and egg until crumbly.
Transfer the milk mixture to a baking dish and cover it with the crumbly mixture.
Bake in the oven for 25 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown.
Let it cool and serve immediately.
Garnish with additional wild marigold petals if desired.
Serve warm or at room temperature, depending on preference.
Refrigerate any leftovers for up to 2 days.
Freeze any leftovers for up to 2 months and thaw at room temperature when needed.
